title: story(impl): author cloud/firestore-tenants Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Author the `cloud/firestore-tenants` Terraform module that provisions the Firestore (Native mode) database, the `tenants` / `share-grants` / `share-audit` collection indexes, and the IAM bindings for the tenant-registry and share-service service accounts.

### Component(s) touched

- [firestore-tenants](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/firestore-tenants.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md), [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-04

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Module declares `google_firestore_database` (Native mode), `google_firestore_index` per documented query path, and the three IAM bindings (tenant-registry RW on tenants; share-service RW on share-grants; share-service append-only on share-audit).
- [ ] Inputs (`project_id`, `location`, `tenant_registry_service_account`, `share_service_service_account`) and outputs (`database_name`, `collections`) match the component design.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes; resources use `create_before_destroy` lifecycle and GCP provider v7.11.0.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): author cloud/media-bucket Terraform module — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Author the `cloud/media-bucket` Terraform module: multi-region GCS bucket with versioning and uniform bucket-level access, IAM bindings for `photo-store-sa` (object CRUD) and `share-service-sa` (signed-URL minting), and a 90-day version lifecycle rule.

### Component(s) touched

- [media-bucket](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/media-bucket.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Module declares `google_storage_bucket` with versioning + UBLA, the documented IAM bindings, and the lifecycle rule (90-day version expiry with retention-override variable).
- [ ] Inputs (`project_id`, `location`, `photo_store_service_account`, `share_service_service_account`) and outputs (`bucket_name`) match the component design.
- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes; `create_before_destroy` lifecycle; GCP provider v7.11.0.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): tenant-registry — protobuf types and Firestore service client — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Define the tenant-registry protobuf request/response types (under `services/tenant-registry/endpoint/endpointpb/`) for create/get/patch/delete/list and add the Firestore-backed `service.TenantsClient` that reads/writes the `tenants` collection (tenant_id, display_name, state, created_at, updated_at).

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-04, TR-05

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Protobuf messages compile and cover all five endpoints' inputs/outputs.
- [ ] `service.TenantsClient` exposes Create/Get/Update/SoftDelete/List against Firestore using the document shape in the component design.
- [ ] Unit tests cover the client with a Firestore fake or emulator.

### Prerequisite tasks

- None (can land before the Terraform module merges; deployment is a later task).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): tenant-registry — app skeleton (config, main, chi mux, TLS) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Scaffold `services/tenant-registry/` following the `services/machine/` reference shape: `main.go` calling `app.Main`, `app/app.go` with `ConfigFromEnv` (HTTP_PORT, GCP_PROJECT_ID), chi mux wiring, self-signed TLS HTTP server started via `conc/pool`, signal-aware context.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Service builds and serves a health endpoint on `HTTP_PORT` (default 8080).
- [ ] `ConfigFromEnv` resolves required env vars via `bedrock` config helpers.
- [ ] Endpoint registration hook is in place (no business endpoints yet — those follow in the next task).

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the protobuf + Firestore client task (so the app can wire the dependency at startup).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): tenant-registry — implement CRUD HTTP endpoints — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Implement the five tenant-registry endpoints (`POST /api/v1/tenants`, `GET /api/v1/tenants/{id}`, `PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{id}`, `DELETE /api/v1/tenants/{id}` soft-delete, `GET /api/v1/tenants` paged list) with protobuf encoding, validation, and `pkg/errorpb`-based error handling. Register them on the chi mux via a `RegisterTenants` function.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-04, TR-05

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All five endpoints respond with the documented protobuf shapes; errors use `application/problem+protobuf` via `pkg/errorpb`.
- [ ] Soft-delete sets `state=evicted` rather than removing the record.
- [ ] Validation paths (display_name required, state transitions) covered by unit tests.

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the protobuf + Firestore client task and the app skeleton task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): tenant-registry — deployment wiring (service account + Cloud Run + LB backend) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Wire the tenant-registry deployment: `tenant-registry-sa` service account (via `cloud/service-account`), Cloud Run service definition, network endpoint group `tenant-registry-{region}-neg`, and backend service attached to the platform HTTPS load balancer. Health check on `HTTP_PORT`.

### Component(s) touched

- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0001](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0001-tenant-state-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Service account exists with read/write only on the `tenants` collection (consumed by `cloud/firestore-tenants`).
- [ ] Cloud Run service deploys with `HTTP_PORT` and `GCP_PROJECT_ID` env vars; health check matches `HTTP_PORT`.
- [ ] Backend service `tenant-registry` registered behind the HTTPS LB; `terraform fmt -recursive -check` passes.

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the `cloud/firestore-tenants` module task and the tenant-registry endpoint task (image needs to exist).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): photo-store — protobuf types, GCS client, and tenant-registry client — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Define photo-store protobuf types for upload/get/delete/list, implement `service.MediaClient` against GCS (object naming `{tenant_id}/{ulid}.{ext}`), and add a small HTTP client to call tenant-registry's `GET /api/v1/tenants/{id}` for upload-time validation.

### Component(s) touched

- [photo-store](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/photo-store.md)
- [tenant-registry](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/tenant-registry.md)

### Design source

- Component designs: see component links above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Protobuf messages cover all four endpoint shapes including the multipart upload metadata.
- [ ] `MediaClient` performs object create/get/delete/list scoped by tenant prefix; ULID generation isolated and tested.
- [ ] Tenant-registry client validates tenant_id and surfaces a typed not-found error.

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the tenant-registry CRUD-endpoint task (target API to call).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): photo-store — endpoints, app skeleton, and deployment wiring — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Scaffold `services/photo-store/` (main, app.ConfigFromEnv with HTTP_PORT + GCP_PROJECT_ID + MEDIA_BUCKET + TENANT_REGISTRY_URL, chi mux), implement the four endpoints (`POST /api/v1/media`, `GET /api/v1/media/{object_id}`, `DELETE /api/v1/media/{object_id}`, `GET /api/v1/media?tenant_id=...`) with per-tenant authz, and wire deployment: `photo-store-sa` service account, Cloud Run service, NEG + LB backend service.

### Component(s) touched

- [photo-store](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/photo-store.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0002](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0002-media-storage.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-01, TR-02

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Endpoints enforce tenant-prefix isolation (caller cannot read/write outside its prefix; share-grant validation hook is stubbed and exercised by tests).
- [ ] Cloud Run service deploys with `photo-store-sa` whose IAM is provided by `cloud/media-bucket`.
- [ ] Backend service registered behind the HTTPS LB; `go test ./services/photo-store/...` passes.

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the `cloud/media-bucket` module task and the photo-store protobuf/client task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): share-service — protobuf types and Firestore clients (grants + append-only audit) — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Define share-service protobuf types for mint/get/revoke/list/signed-URL endpoints. Implement `service.GrantsClient` (RW on `share-grants`) and `service.AuditClient` (append-only writes to `share-audit`, surface a typed error on any update/delete attempt).

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Protobuf shapes cover all five endpoint inputs/outputs and the audit event types `granted`/`revoked`/`accessed`.
- [ ] `GrantsClient` supports the documented document shape and an index-friendly list-by-tenant query.
- [ ] `AuditClient` only exposes Append; tests confirm no update/delete paths exist.

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the `cloud/firestore-tenants` module task (collections + indexes must exist for integration tests).

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): share-service — endpoints, signed-URL minting, app skeleton, and deployment wiring — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Scaffold `services/share-service/` (main, app.ConfigFromEnv with HTTP_PORT, GCP_PROJECT_ID, MEDIA_BUCKET), implement the five endpoints (`POST /api/v1/shares`, `GET /api/v1/shares/{grant_id}`, `DELETE /api/v1/shares/{grant_id}` with audit revoke event, `GET /api/v1/shares/{grant_id}/url` minting a short-lived signed URL with audit accessed event, `GET /api/v1/shares?tenant_id=...`), and wire deployment: `share-service-sa` service account, Cloud Run service, NEG + LB backend service.

### Component(s) touched

- [share-service](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/components/share-service.md)

### Design source

- Component design: see component link above.
- ADR(s): [ADR-0003](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/adrs/0003-share-grants.md)
- TR(s) realized: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All five endpoints respond with the documented protobuf shapes; revoke and signed-URL paths each write the matching audit event.
- [ ] Signed-URL minting respects `expires_at` from the grant and refuses revoked grants.
- [ ] Cloud Run service deploys with `share-service-sa`; backend service registered behind the HTTPS LB.

### Prerequisite tasks

- Depends on the share-service protobuf/Firestore-clients task, the `cloud/media-bucket` module task (signed-URL IAM), and the `cloud/firestore-tenants` module task.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)

title: story(impl): capability docs — operator runbook page and Hugo cross-link verification — self-hosted-personal-media-storage
body:
### Implementation task

Add an operator-facing page under `docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/` summarizing deployment topology (three Cloud Run services + two Terraform modules), env-var checklist per service, and rollout/rollback notes. Verify all `ref`/`relref` links across the capability bundle resolve via `hugo server`.

### Component(s) touched

- All five components (cross-cutting docs).

### Design source

- Tech design overview + component designs.
- TR(s) realized: documentation/operability surface implied by TR-01.

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] New docs page has explicit Hugo `type:` frontmatter and uses `ref`/`relref` for every internal link.
- [ ] `hugo server` builds the site cleanly with no broken-link warnings touching this capability.
- [ ] Page covers per-service env vars, the two Terraform module inputs, and rollout/rollback ordering (modules before services).

### Prerequisite tasks

- Soft-depends on all earlier tasks landing (so env-var lists are accurate); can be drafted in parallel and finalized last.

### Authoring

This task's per-PR development plan will be authored via the Step 12 flow.

### Parent capability

[self-hosted-personal-media-storage](../docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-personal-media-storage/_index.md)
